name: Hot Fudge Pudding Cake 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a medium mixing bowl, combine 3/4 cup sugar, flour, 3 tbsp cocoa, baking powder, and salt.
3. Add milk, melted butter, and vanilla; beat until smooth.
4. Pour the batter into an 8 x 8 inch (or 9 x 9 inch) square pan.
5. In a small bowl, combine the remaining 1/2 cup sugar, brown sugar, and the remaining 3 tbsp cocoa.
6. Sprinkle this mixture evenly over the batter.
7. Carefully pour hot water over the top of the cake. Do not stir.
8. Bake for 40 minutes or until the center is almost set.
9. Allow the cake to stand for 15 minutes.
10. Carefully spoon the cake into dessert dishes, making sure to scrape the sauce from the bottom of the pan over the top.
